description: Rename/move one or more files or directories. Each item is evaluated in order. On Windows, case-only renames (e.g. 'foo.txt' → 'Foo.txt') are handled automatically via a two-step rename. Example: {"_": [{"from": "old.go", "to": "new.go"}, {"from": "temp", "to": "archive/temp"}]}
name: rename
